title: Hyper Real Minecraft
description: Just a modpack adding many realistic items, visuals, biomes, and more.
body:
A Hyper Realistic minecraft with great visuals, items, biomes, ores, and more. This modpack has a large shader mod, adding many settings such as night skys, planets, suns, glares, and great views. There are multiple mods adding armor with new materials from more biomes in the nether, and end. You will find many new clothing and custom clothing mods with mobile wardrobes, armor slots, and more. There are also new overworld biomes adding more woods, doors, items, and extra features.

A modpack by LoudFan23
